d: Laios summons a slow-moving armor with infinite HP, controlled by Kensuke. This Living Armor starts with 1,000 Energy and deals damage equal to [[300%]] of Laios' ATK. It loses [[25]] Energy per second while it exists. Whenever it takes base damage exceeding [[250%]] of the caster's ATK, it loses an extra [[100]] Energy. At zero Energy, the armor crumbles on the spot but regains [[125]] Energy per second until its Energy is full again, and then it returns to combat. When casting this skill again, Laios recovers 1,000 Energy for Kensuke, grants it control immunity and increases its ATK SPD by [[120]] over the next [[10]]s.
Increases the Living Armor's ATK to [[320%]] of Laios' ATK.
Increases the Living Armor's ATK to [[340%]] of Laios' ATK.
Increases the Living Armor's ATK to [[360%]] of Laios' ATK.
Increases the Living Armor's ATK to [[380%]] of Laios' ATK.

Laios spreads his limbs to appear larger and lets out an intimidating roar. Enemies within 3 adjacent tiles in front become confused, unable to move or act and suffer a [[44%]] reduction in both Phys DEF and Magic DEF for [[3]]s. If the targets are monsters, the confusion effect extends for an additional [[4]]s after the skill ends.
Increases the Phys DEF and Magic DEF reduction to [[46%]].
Increases the Phys DEF and Magic DEF reduction to [[48%]].
Increases the Phys DEF and Magic DEF reduction to [[50%]].

Passive. Whenever an enemy monster is defeated, Laios collects an ingredient from it and instantly recovers [[250]] Energy and [[500%]]<ATK> HP.
Laios uses the collected ingredients and cooks on the spot, recovering [[500%]]<ATK> HP for allies within [[2]] tiles and increasing their ATK by [[20%]] for [[8]]s. When actively used, for each ingredient Laios has collected, the cooked meal randomly grants one of the following extra buffs:
Increases Phys DEF and Magic DEF by [[40%]], increases Haste by [[30]], or recovers [[100%]]<ATK> HP per second. Extra buffs can be triggered up to [[3]] times. If Marcille receives the buff, she recovers an extra [[300]] Energy.
Increases HP recovery amount from cooking to [[520%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP recovery amount from cooking to [[540%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP recovery amount from cooking to [[560%]]<ATK>.
Laios increases his ATK by [[12%]] during battle.
Laios increases his ATK by [[16%]] during battle.
Laios increases his ATK by [[20%]] during battle.

When a battle starts, if there are any monsters among the enemies, Laios takes out his Dungeon Gourmet Guide and starts analyzing those monsters to make them drop more ingredients. Each monster will prematurely drop an extra ingredient the first time it loses [[30%]] of its max HP. Each monster can only drop [[1]] extra ingredient this way.
Increases the damage Laios deals to monsters (excluding heroes and their summoned units) by [[50%]].
Permanently increases Laios' Phys DEF and Magic DEF by [[25%]] for each ingredient collected from monsters, up to [[3]] stacks.
Increases the damage Laios deals to monsters (excluding heroes and their summoned units) by [[80%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, reduces damage taken by [[10%]] for [[20]]s when a battle starts. [[20]]s later, increases damage dealt by [[10%]] for [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 12 Healing, 18 Crit Resist.

d: Laios permanently increases his max HP by [[20%]] each time he collects a different ingredient using Dungeon Gourmet. This effect can be triggered up to [[3]] times.
